  \"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/gcc--96dfb333\",\n      \"path\": \"gcc/dwarf2asm.cc\",\n      \"symbol\": \"dw2_asm_output_data\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"text\": \"# GCC DWARF Debug Information Generation Chain\\n\\n## Overview\\nThe GCC DWARF debug information generation is structured in a multi-phase architecture where the front-end communicates with the debug back-end through a hook interface (`gcc_debug_hooks`), which is implemented by the DWARF2 subsystem.\\n\\n## Key Architecture Components\\n\\n### 1. Debug Hook Interface (gcc/debug.h)\\nThe `struct gcc_debug_hooks` defined in `gcc/debug.h` is the primary interface between the compiler front-end and the DWARF debug information generator. It includes hooks for:\\n\\n- **Initialization/Finalization**: `init()`, `finish()`, `early_finish()`\\n- **Function/Variable Processing**: `early_global_decl()`, `late_global_decl()`, `function_decl()`\\n- **Type Information**: `type_decl()`\\n- **Lexical Blocks**: `begin_block()`, `end_block()`, `ignore_block()`\\n- **Source Location Tracking**: `source_line()`, `begin_prologue()`, `end_prologue()`, `var_location()`\\n- **Module/Declaration Imports**: `imported_module_or_decl()`\\n- **Preprocessing Information**: `define()`, `undef()`, `start_source_file()`, `end_source_file()`\\n\\nThe global instance `debug_hooks` is set at runtime (in `gcc/toplev.cc`) to point to `dwarf2_debug_hooks` based on debugging options.\\n\\n### 2. DWARF DIE Creation (gcc/dwarf2out.cc)\\nDEBUG Information Entries (DIEs) are created through a two-level mechanism:\\n\\n- **`new_die_raw(enum dwarf_tag tag)`**: Low-level DIE allocation that creates an uninitialized `struct die_struct` with the specified DWARF tag. Located in `gcc/dwarf2out.cc`.\\n\\n- **`new_die(enum dwarf_tag tag, dw_die_ref parent_die, tree t)`**: Higher-level DIE creation that:\\n  - Calls `new_die_raw()` to allocate the DIE\\n  - Adds the DIE as a child to its parent via `add_child_die()`\\n  - Handles \\\"limbo DIEs\\\" (parentless DIEs) using a special limbo die list\\n  - Associates the DIE with tree nodes via lookup tables\\n\\n- **`add_child_die(dw_die_ref parent_die, dw_die_ref child_die)`**: Adds a DIE as the last child of another DIE, maintaining the DIE tree structure.\\n\\nThe `dw_die_ref` typedef (defined in `gcc/dwarf2out.h`) is a pointer to `struct die_struct`, the internal representation of a DWARF Debug Info Entry.\\n\\n### 3. DWARF Output Generation (gcc/dwarf2out.cc)\\nOnce DIEs are created, the DWARF sections are generated during the `dwarf2out_finish()` function, which:\\n\\n- **`output_comp_unit(dw_die_ref die, unsigned int depth, dw_die_ref *checksum)`**: Outputs a complete compilation unit\\n  - Calls `output_die()` recursively to output all DIEs in the unit\\n  - Handles abbreviation table generation\\n  - Manages DWARF section output\\n\\n- **`output_die(dw_die_ref die)`**: Recursively outputs a DIE and all its attributes:\\n  - Emits the DIE tag and attributes\\n  - Calls itself recursively for child DIEs\\n  - Uses attribute output functions to serialize DIE data\\n\\n### 4. Line Number Table Emission (gcc/dwarf2out.cc)\\nSource location information is tracked and output via:\\n\\n- **`new_line_info_table()`**: Creates a new `dw_line_info_table` structure for a section, initializing line number state machine parameters (file number, line number, statement marker, view, etc.)\\n\\n- **`set_cur_line_info_table(section *sec)`**: Sets the current line info table for a specific section (text_section, cold_text_section, or other sections)\\n\\n- **`output_line_info(bool prologue_only)`**: Main function for outputting the `.debug_line` section:\\n  - Generates the line number program header (version, minimum instruction length, etc.)\\n  - Outputs the file names table\\n  - Outputs the line number program state machine instructions\\n\\n- **`output_one_line_info_table(dw_line_info_table *table)`**: Outputs a single line number table into the `.debug_line` section:\\n  - Encodes source line number information using the line number program state machine\\n  - Handles address setting (LI_set_address)\\n  - Handles line number updates (LI_set_line)\\n  - Handles file number changes (LI_set_file)\\n  - Handles column information (LI_set_column)\\n  - Handles discriminator values (LI_set_discriminator)\\n\\n### 5. Runtime Hook Dispatch (gcc/toplev.cc)\\nThe debug hooks are initialized in `toplev.cc`:\\n- The global `debug_hooks` pointer is assigned to `&dwarf2_debug_hooks` when DWARF2 debugging is enabled\\n- The `dwarf2_debug_hooks` structure contains function pointers to all DWARF2-specific implementations\\n- Hook implementations include functions like `dwarf2out_init()`, `dwarf2out_early_global_decl()`, `dwarf2out_source_line()`, etc.\\n\\n## Execution Flow\\n\\n1. **Early Debug Phase**: When `dwarf2out_init()` is called, it initializes data structures for DIE creation and early compilation unit setup\\n\\n2. **Compilation Phase**: As the compiler processes declarations and definitions, front-end calls debug hooks:\\n   - `dwarf2out_early_global_decl()` for declarations\\n   - `dwarf2out_late_global_decl()` for variable/function definitions with full information\\n   - `dwarf2out_function_decl()` for function definitions\\n   - `dwarf2out_source_line()` for source location tracking\\n   - `dwarf2out_var_location()` for variable location information\\n\\n3. **DIE Creation**: Debug hooks create DIEs using `new_die()` and `new_die_raw()`, building a tree structure via `add_child_die()`\\n\\n4. **Finish Phase**: At end of compilation, `dwarf2out_finish()` orchestrates:\\n   - Walking all created DIEs\\n   - Outputting compilation units via `output_comp_unit()`\\n   - Outputting DIEs recursively via `output_die()`\\n   - Generating the line number table via `output_line_info()`\\n\\n## Supporting Infrastructure\\n\\n- **gcc/dwarf2asm.cc**: Low-level DWARF assembly output functions (`dw2_asm_output_data()`, etc.)\\n- **gcc/dwarf2cfi.cc**: Call Frame Information (CFI) generation for exception handling\\n- **gcc/dwarf2ctf.cc**: CTF (Compact Type Format) debug info generation from DWARF DIEs\\n- **gcc/ctfc.cc**: CTF container management and type definition tracking\\n- **gcc/final.cc**: Final assembly phase, calls debug hooks for prologue/epilogue tracking\\n\\nThis architecture allows GCC to generate complete DWARF2 debug information through a clean hook-based interface, enabling support for multiple debug formats while maintaining a consistent internal representation based on DWARF DIEs.\"\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/answer.json",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

        Bash Commands (5)
        
1. $ find . -name "dwarf2out.cc" -type f 2>/dev/null
2. $ wc -l gcc/dwarf2out.cc 2>/dev/null || echo "File not found locally"
3. $ grep -n "^new_die_raw\|^new_die (" gcc/dwarf2out.cc 2>/dev/null | head -20
4. $ grep -n "^const struct gcc_debug_hooks dwarf2_debug_hooks" gcc/dwarf2out.cc 2>/dev/null || grep -n "dwarf2_debug_hooks =" gcc/dwarf2out.cc 2>/dev/null | head -5
5. $ wc -l /workspace/gcc/dwarf2out.cc 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || echo "File not in workspace"
